questionHtml:
Which equation represents the N–H bond enthalpy in NH3?

A.  NH3 (g) → N (g) + 3H (g)

B.  13NH3 (g) → 13N (g) + H (g)

C.  NH3 (g) → 12N2 (g) + 32H2 (g)

D.  NH3 (g) → •NH2 (g) + •H (g)

meta.title: Which equation represents the N–H bond enthalpy in NH3? A. NH3 (g) → N (g) + 3H (g) B. 13NH3 (g) → 13N (g) + H (g) C. NH3 (g) → 12N2 (g) + 32H2 (g) D. NH3 (g) → •NH2 (g) + •H (g)
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 1.2.1—Bond-breaking absorbs and bond-forming releases energy. Calculate the enthalpy change of a reaction from given average bond enthalpy data.
